# ~/.inputrc — readline bindings for Termux arrow keys
# Generated by android-terminal-setup skill
# NOTE: Open a NEW Termux session after creating/editing this file.
#   `source ~/.inputrc` does NOT work — bash reads it once at shell startup.

# Arrow keys for bash history
"\e[A": previous-history
"\e[B": next-history
"\e[C": forward-char
"\e[D": backward-char

# Home / End
"\e[1~": beginning-of-line
"\e[4~": end-of-line
"\e[H": beginning-of-line
"\e[F": end-of-line

# Delete / Insert
"\e[3~": delete-char
"\e[2~": quoted-insert

# Ctrl + arrow (word-skip)
"\e[1;5C": forward-word
"\e[1;5D": backward-word
"\e[5C": forward-word
"\e[5D": backward-word
"\eOC": forward-word
"\eOD": backward-word

# Page Up / Page Down (history search)
"\e[5~": beginning-of-history
"\e[6~": end-of-history

# Settings
set bell-style none
set completion-ignore-case on
set show-all-if-ambiguous on
